name: read_rtp_all role returns isActive true for a payer on any Service Provider
description:
Payer activated under SP A.
Token with read_rtp_all can read across all Service Providers:
the admin client sub does not match SP A, yet isActive must be true.
descriptionHtml:
Payer activated under SP A.
Token with read_rtp_all can read across all Service Providers:
the admin client sub does not match SP A, yet isActive must be true.

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get Activation Status by Fiscal Code
